---
title: "African Maternal Mortality — Interactive"
subtitle: "Hover over any bar to see the country, year, MMR, and the WHO uncertainty range"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    output-file: index.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
```

```{r interactive-barplot, fig.width=10, fig.height=14}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggiraph)
library(scales)

source("R/theme_bka.R")

# ---- Load real WHO MMR data ----
mmr <- read.csv("data/africa_mmr.csv") %>%
  arrange(mmr) %>%
  mutate(country = factor(country, levels = country))

# ---- Build tooltip text (HTML) ----
mmr <- mmr %>%
  mutate(
    bar_id = paste0("country_", country_code),
    tooltip_text = paste0(
      "<b>", country, "</b> (", year, ")<br>",
      "<b>", comma(round(mmr)), "</b> deaths per 100,000 live births<br>",
      "WHO uncertainty range: ", comma(round(low)), "–", comma(round(high))
    )
  )

# ---- BKA palette (deliberately not Economist blue+red) ----
BAR_FILL    <- "#242852"   # BKA navy — sober, authoritative bar fill
BRAND_COLOR <- "#F8A623"   # BKA amber — warm accent stripe
LABEL_BLUE  <- "#005CB9"   # BKA dark blue — only for outside-bar labels
BKA_NAVY    <- "#242852"   # title text
BKA_GREY    <- "#606060"   # subtitle, caption

LABEL_THRESHOLD <- 200

# ---- Main interactive horizontal barplot ----
plt <- ggplot(mmr, aes(x = mmr, y = country)) +
  geom_col_interactive(
    aes(tooltip = tooltip_text, data_id = bar_id),
    fill = BAR_FILL, width = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1050),
    breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 200),
    labels = scales::comma,
    expand = c(0, 0),
    position = "top"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(add = c(0, 0.6))) +
  geom_label(
    data = subset(mmr, mmr < LABEL_THRESHOLD),
    aes(x = mmr, label = country),
    hjust = 0, nudge_x = 12,
    colour = LABEL_BLUE, fill = "white",
    linewidth = NA, label.padding = unit(0.18, "lines"),
    family = "Lato", size = 3.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = subset(mmr, mmr >= LABEL_THRESHOLD),
    aes(x = 0, label = country),
    hjust = 0, nudge_x = 15,
    colour = "white", family = "Lato",
    size = 3.6, fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_bka() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#A8BAC4", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x       = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y       = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.left   = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.text.y        = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks         = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x.top    = element_text(family = "Lato", size = 12, color = BKA_GREY),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 25, 15, 15)
  )

# ---- Brand bar header (BKA amber stripe) ----
brand_bar <- ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1,    ymin = 0.55, ymax = 0.70, fill = BRAND_COLOR) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 0.04, ymin = 0.05, ymax = 0.55, fill = BRAND_COLOR) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void()

# ---- Compose with patchwork ----
composed <- (brand_bar / plt) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.02, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Only 4 of 47 African countries meet the SDG maternal-mortality target",
    subtitle = "Maternal deaths per 100,000 live births (WHO, 2023): Nigeria's rate (993) is 25\u00d7 Cabo Verde's (40); SDG 3.1 target is < 70  |  Hover over bars for details",
    caption  = paste0(
      "Source: WHO Global Health Observatory (indicator MDG_0000000026, retrieved Apr 2026) | BKA analysis\n",
      "Visualization: BK Advisors \u2014 bk-advisors.github.io"
    ),
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(family = "Lato", face = "bold",
                                   size = 18, color = BKA_NAVY,
                                   margin = margin(t = 6, b = 4),
                                   lineheight = 1.15),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(family = "Lato", size = 12,
                                   color = BKA_GREY,
                                   margin = margin(b = 10),
                                   lineheight = 1.2),
      plot.caption  = element_text(family = "Lato", size = 9,
                                   color = BKA_GREY, hjust = 0)
    )
  )

# ---- Render as interactive widget ----
girafe(
  ggobj = composed,
  width_svg = 10,
  height_svg = 14,
  options = list(
    opts_tooltip(
      css = paste0(
        "background-color:", BKA_NAVY, ";",
        "color:white;",
        "padding:8px 12px;",
        "border-radius:4px;",
        "font-family:Lato,Arial,sans-serif;",
        "font-size:13px;",
        "line-height:1.4;",
        "box-shadow:2px 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);"
      ),
      opacity = 0.95
    ),
    opts_hover(
      css = "stroke:#242852;stroke-width:2px;cursor:pointer;"
    ),
    opts_sizing(rescale = TRUE, width = 1)
  )
)
```
